title: An Act Regarding Children with Behavioral Health Needs Awaiting Placement in Residential Care Facilities
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 14, 2025
last_senate_action: 5/14/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on February 27, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
